name: keydex
title: Keydex
description: An index of every keyboard shortcut across your apps — auto-discovered from ghostty, nvim, tmux, zsh, obsidian, vscode, cursor, zed, and any GUI app's menus via Accessibility.
author: finnjanssens

commands.name: search-shortcuts
commands.title: Search Shortcuts
commands.subtitle: Keydex
commands.description: Fuzzy-search keyboard shortcuts across your tools

preferences.name: includeAccessibility
preferences.label: GUI app shortcuts
preferences.description: Read menu-bar shortcuts of running apps via the Accessibility API (requires granting Raycast Accessibility permission).
